title: capsella grossa
intro: Capsella grossa, also known as shepherds purse, is a flowering plant in the mustard family Brassicaceae. The plant has been used in traditional medicine for its medicinal properties, including its anti-inflammatory and antiseptic properties, which make it effective in treating wounds and skin conditions such as eczema and acne. Shepherds purse has been found to have various health benefits, including reducing bleeding and inflammation, promoting healing, and improving digestion. Herbal preparations of shepherds purse include teas, tinctures, and infusions, which can be used to treat a range of health issues, including menstrual cramps and respiratory problems.
